title: Silky Adventurous Dutch Grapefruit Stir-fry
description: A floral and silky Dutch dish featuring grapefruit juice as the base, sautéed with raw-friendly vegetables for a unique twist on stir-fry.
instructions: Combine grapefruit juice, broccoli florets, red bell pepper slices, green onion chiffonade, and garlic cloves in a bowl.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the vegetable mixture and cook for about 5 minutes until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Stir-fry for an additional minute to meld all flavors together. Remove from heat immediately as overcooking can cause unwanted bitterness in grapefruit juice.
Serve hot with a side of steamed rice or noodles for a complete meal.
